data.headline: No Trading Activity; Underperformance vs SPY Benchmark
data.summary: Portfolio remained in cash with zero trades executed. Starting cash of $1,000,000 and ending cash of $1,000,000 produced a portfolio return of 0.0%, underperforming the SPY benchmark by 0.0523% (alpha: -0.000523). No positions were held. 2 decisions were evaluated during the session.
data.risk_note: Cash drag: Holding 100% cash on a positive market day (SPY +0.0523%) resulted in opportunity cost. No trading was undertaken despite market movement.
